description: One adoption, many renditions: report format registry and rendition projection contract. Design doc: docs/backend/report-renditions-design.md
core_rule: Renditions are projections of adopted report items. Regenerating or deleting a rendition never mutates adoption status, generated_news, recommendation chain or the company SQL export. Business boards live only in insight fields and rendition grouping; they must never be written to generated_news.category or company SQL category.

report_formats: builtin/locked (company_sql_v1 is locked: structure fixed in code, only enabled can toggle)
export_targets.targets (subset of: md/html; company SQL export is NOT configured here)

summary_json_contract.weekly_rule_v1: Weekly rendition summaries are generated from adopted weekly_report_items. The API-facing weekly_reports.summary is refreshed by the backend when a weekly draft is created or a weekly item is edited, so the frontend never computes report summaries locally.
summary_json_contract.future_model_slot: A later MiniMax weekly summary generator may replace summary_text/key_highlights while preserving the same summary_json fields and keeping rendition regeneration idempotent.

column_additions.generated_news.insight_json: Model-generated auxiliary fields for tech-insight renditions: board (from config/taxonomy/business_boards.json), bullet_points[], takeaway, tag_line[]. Strictly separate from content_json; company SQL export never reads it.
column_additions.daily_report_items.is_headline: Editor-adjustable headline flag. Auto-initialized to recommendation-score top-N on first headline-enabled rendition build; never auto-overwritten afterwards.
column_additions.generated_news.template_extras_json: implemented (2026-07-08, backend/app/models/content.py; covered by backend/tests/test_generation_template.py): per-format_code bucket of template-generated extra fields ({values, generated_by, generated_at, template_version}). Never merged into content_json/insight_json/category, never exported to SQL, never fed into dedupe or recommendation. Spec: docs/backend/report-renditions-design.md section 10.
column_additions.report_formats.generation_template + gen: implemented (2026-07-08, backend/app/models/reports.py): canonical template (JSON) plus uploaded source text (JSON or XML carrier). Always null for builtin formats (company_sql_v1/tech_insight_v1).

generation_template.status: implemented (2026-07-08): parsing/projection/incremental generation in backend/app/reports/ + generation chain, validate-template API in backend/app/api/routes/reports.py; covered by backend/tests/test_generation_template.py (incl. the negative assertion that company SQL stays byte-identical under any template config)
generation_template.spec: docs/backend/reports-editorial-design.md section 8.1 (fact source: data-flow position and projection-vs-generation decision) + docs/backend/report-renditions-design.md section 10 (implementation-level detail)
generation_template.canonical_form: XML uploads are parsed with a DTD/external-entity-free parser and stored as the same canonical JSON template; runtime reads canonical form only.

item_schema_field.key: ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$, unique, <=32 chars, max 24 fields per template
item_schema_field.map_from: null or a base-draft superset path: title|summary|key_points|category|content_json.{background,effects,eventSummary,technologyAndInnovation,valueAndImpact}|insight_json.{board,bullet_points,takeaway,tag_line}|source_link|published_at|score
item_schema_field.example_guidance_label: must not contain script/style/HTML tags; canonical template <=32KB

generation_template.decision_rule: map_from set or key matching a superset tail name => projection field (no model call); otherwise => extra field generated once per (generated_news, format_code) into generated_news.template_extras_json. Templates whose fields all project are pure-projection formats with zero extra model calls.
generation_template.degradation: Provider unavailable/timeout/budget exhausted => renditions still project; missing extras fall back to map_from or empty and the body_json item is flagged template_fallback with missing_fields; regenerate backfills. Template failures never block the company_sql_v1 chain or adoption.
generation_template.weekly: Same mechanism for report_type=weekly formats; extras are read through weekly_report_items.generated_news_id.
api: POST /api/report-formats and PATCH /api/report-formats/{id} accept generation_template (locked/builtin formats answer 400)
POST /api/report-formats/validate-template (workspace admin+): dry-run validation + normalized_template + projection/generated field split + example preview_item; writes nothing

builtin_formats.company_sql_v1: 内网版 locked builtin. group_by=category, no headline, five_fields body. The ONLY source feeding the company SQL export chain, which stays on its original hardcoded path.
builtin_formats.tech_insight_v1: 技术洞察版 builtin. group_by=board, headline auto top-6 editable, tag_line/bullet_points/takeaway/source_link fields, exports md+html aligned with 周报文件/技术洞察日报-*.{md,html} samples.

insight_resolution_order: generated_news.insight_json (MiniMax prompt v2 output, validated against business_boards.json)

rule fallback: board from source board_relevance_json else category mapping; bullets from eventSummary+technologyAndInnovation; takeaway from valueAndImpact/effects; tag_line from board+category+expert route

checks: category is one of config/taxonomy/news_categories.json categories
content_json has the five company SQL fields and no HTML/script pollution
insight_json has board, useful bullet_points, takeaway and tag_line for tech_insight_v1
numeric claims such as percentages, P95/P99, multiples and latency/memory figures must already appear in the source

api: GET/POST /api/report-formats, PATCH/DELETE /api/report-formats/{id} (locked: enabled-only; builtin: no delete)
invariants: Company SQL contract unchanged: only published daily reports, adoption_status=2, generation_status=ready, generated_by not rule_v1, 10 categories, five content_json fields.
insight_json is never merged into content_json and never exported to SQL.
Custom formats affect rendition views and md/html exports only.
Rendition regeneration is idempotent on (report_type, report_id, format_code).
generation_template is declarative data only: no template-string evaluation (no Jinja/Liquid/eval), md/html exports escape template labels and values, XML parsing rejects DTD/external entities.
template_extras_json never enters content_json, insight_json, generated_news.category, company SQL, dedupe or recommendation inputs; company SQL output stays byte-identical with or without templates.
